content:
MODULE: cosmos.cli.rich_cli
FILE: cosmos/cli/rich_cli.py (728 lines)
CATEGORY: cli

DESCRIPTION: Cosmos Rich CLI - Terminal UI with Swarm Integration.

AGI v1.8.4 Feature: Enhanced terminal interface using Rich/Textual
for real-time swarm interaction with visual agent status and signal monitoring.

Features:
- Split-pane TUI with agent status and signal feed
- Real-time chat with deliberation d

CLASSES:
- PanelType(Enum): Types of panels in the TUI.
- AgentDisplay: Display state for an agent.
  Methods: def get_icon(self) -> str
  Methods: def get_color(self) -> str
- SignalDisplay: Display state for a Nexus signal.
  Methods: def get_color(self) -> str
- ChatMessage: A chat message in the display.
  Methods: def get_prefix(self) -> str
  Methods: def get_color(self) -> str
- RichCLI: Rich terminal UI for Cosmos swarm interaction.

Provides a visual interface with
  Methods: async def run(self) -> None
  Methods: def add_signal(self, signal: SignalDisplay) -> None
  Methods: def add_canvas_figure(self, figure: Any) -> None
  Methods: async def connect_nexus(self, nexus) -> None

PUBLIC FUNCTIONS:
- async def run_rich_cli(data_dir: str='./data') -> None
- def main()
